add-a-song: ’A fa’a’o’o i te hō’ē hīmene nō roto mai i tā tātou puta hīmene i runga i te tātara’a parau mātā’ia o te putuputura'a.
add-a-video-explain: A ’āmui i te hō’ē tēni jw.org i roto i te tāpura. Te fa’a’ite-hia nei te mau tēni ’āpī roa a’e i ’anorei, tera rā e nehenehe tā ’oe e mā’imi i te tahi atu.
add-bible-verses-sign-language-explain: A fa’a’ohipa i teie ’āfata nō te ’āmui i te mau tēni nō te mau ’orero Bibilia i mā’iti-hia i roto i te reo tūra’i i fa’atano-hia.
add-extra-media: A ’āmui mai i te tahi atu mau roromira
add-media-audio-bible: A ’āmui i te mau haruharu’a reo nō Te Bibilia — Hurira’a o te Ao ’Āpī
add-media-audio-bible-explain: A mā’iti i te puta e te pōpōra’a Bibilia nō te roromi i te reo o te mau ’orero.
add-media-study-bible: A ’āmui i te roromira nō roto mai i Te Bibilia ha’api’ira’a
add-media-study-bible-explain: A mā’iti i te hō’ē puta Bibilia e te hō’ē pōpōra’a ta’a nō te hi’opo’a i te tāpura o te mau mātēria ha’api’ira’a mai te mau hōho’a, te mau tēni, te mau nūpa, e te mau tū’atira’a tōpari.
advancedDescription: E nehenehe tā te feiā fa’a’ohipa ’aravihi e fa’atano i teie mau tāpūpūra’a. E tano maita’i te fa’anahora’a mātāmua nō te rahira’a o te ta’ata.
all-clips-with-this-icon-will-play: E ha’uti-fa’ahou-hia te mau tēni poto tā’āto’ara’a e taua hōho’a tāpa’o ra te tahi i muri i te tahi
all-items-hidden: ’Ua huna-tā’āto’a-hia te mau roromira nō teie tuha’a rurura’a.
also-look-for-this-button-in-m-s-footer: Tāpiri atu, a mā’imi i teie pata i te pae raro o M³:
app-description: Te « Meeting Media Manager », o te hō’ē ia rorohiko tū’ati-rau nō te fa’ahōho’a i te mau roromira i te mau rurura’a a te amuira’a a te Ite nō Iehova.
app-issues: Mai te peu e tupu te hō’ē fifi e rānei ’ua ’ite mai ’oe i te hō’ē hape rorohiko, a hāmani i te hō’ē parau anira’a pe’ape’a e rānei te hō’ē ’āparaura’a i ni’a i tā mātou ’api pūhara GitHub.
app-updates: Te mau fa’ahou-ra’a o te application
applicationConfigurationDescription: A fa’atano i te huru ’ohipa e te tōmana o teie application
architecture-mismatch-explain: Te ha’uti ra paha ’oe i te hō’ē tū’atira’a 32-bit o te M³ i ni’a i te hō’ē pūnaho fa’ahorora’a 64-bit. Nō te hō’ē ’ohipara’a maita’i a’e e te pāpū, tē pāhono atu nei mātou ia tātaramoana e ia tu’u i te tū’atira’a 64-bit o te M³.
archive-file-found: E ti’a ia fa’ariro-fa’ata’a-ē-hia te mau putu’ite fa’aherehere.
are-you-sure-delete: ’Ua pāpū ānei ’oe e tāmā i te putu’ite "{mediaToDelete}"?
are-you-sure-delete-all: ’Ua pāpū ānei ’oe e tāmā i te mau mea tā’āto’ara’a i tu’u-rima-hia nō te mahana i mā’itihia?
are-you-sure-delete-cache: ’Ua pāpū ānei ’oe e tāmā i te mau putu’ite tāpuni tā’āto’ara’a?
are-you-sure-delete-unused-cache: ​’Ua pāpū ānei ’oe e tāmā i te mau putu’ite fa’a’ohipa-’ore-hia nō roto mai i te pūputu’ite tāpuni?
are-you-sure-you-want-to-delete-this-pro: ’Ua pāpū ānei ’oe e tāmā i te tōfati {profileName}?
attemptingToFetchMemorialBannerAndIntroV: Tē fā’ari’ira’a i te mau roromira nō te fa’ahōho’a i te Oro’a Ha’amana’ora’a
audio-bible: Haruharura’a pūai reo o te Bibilia
audio-bible-media: Te mau haruharura’a pūai reo o te Hurira’a a te ao ’āu’ī
auto-update-app: Tāuta-noa-ra’a i te mau fa’ahou-ra’a o te fa’anahora’a
auto-update-app-explain: E ti’a ia fa’atura noa teie mā’itira’a nō te fā’ari’i i te mau tuha’a ’āu’ī roa a’e, te mau ha’amaita’ira’a, e te tāmāra’a i te mau hape.
automatic-sync-disabled: ’Ua tūpatihia te tū’atira’a ’a’ano noa o te mahana e te hora o te putuputura’a
automatic-sync-disabled-explain: E tūpatihia noa te tū’atira’a nō teie tōfati e tae noa atu e fa’ata’ahia ai te reo ’āu’ī i roto i te mau fa’anahora’a.
automatic-sync-enabled: ’Ua fa’atū’atihia te tū’atira’a ’a’ano noa o te mahana e te hora o te putuputura’a
autoReturnFromWebsite: E haere ’a’ano noa i te tāpura roromira i muri iho i te tāpūra’a i te tū’atira’a ’āpure
autoReturnFromWebsiteDescription: ’Ia fa’aturahia, e haere ’a’ano noa te fa’anahora’a i te tāpura roromira i muri iho i te tāpūra’a i te tū’atira’a ’āpure.
autoStartAtLogin: E ha’amā’iti ’a’ano noa ia M³ ’ia tūmā te rorouira
autoStartAtLogin-explain: E nehenehe tā M³ e ha’amata-noa-ra’a ’ia tū’ama-hia te application.
autoStartMusic: E ha’amata-noa i te pehe roromira hou te putuputura'a
autoStartMusic-explain: E ha’amata-noa te pehe roromira ’ia fati te parau ē e ha’amata te putuputura'a i roto i te tahi mau minuti ’aore rā hora i muri i te ha’atama-ra’a ia M³.
baseUrl-explain: ’A pāpa’i i te vāhi noho nō te tahua natirara a te 'Ite o Iehova.
beginPlaybackPaused: Ha’atere i te parau mātā’ia ma te fa’ataupū
beginPlaybackPaused-explain: ’Ia fa’aterehia teie rāve’a, e ha’amata te parau mātā’ia fa’aro’o ’e te roro uira ma te fa’ataupū, nō te tauturu ia ’oe ’ia fa’aineine i te tahi atu mau ’ohipa (mai te hāpa’ira’a o Zoom) hou a ha’atere ai.
beta-tooltip: Tei roto teie rāve’a i te tahi mau tāmā’atara’a (beta), ’e e nehenehe e tupu te hapa. ’A ara maita’i ’ia fa’a’ohipa ’oe i teie rāve’a i te taime putuputura'a, ’e ’a fa’a’ite mai i te mau fifi ta ’oe e firi mai.
beta-version-warning: He neneva teie (beta), ’e ’eiaha e fa’a’ohipahia i te Piha a te Basileia ’aore rā nō te mau putuputura'a mātā’ia maita’i.
cacheFolder: Vāhi noho o te putu’era’a tāmau
cacheFolder-explain: ’A mā’iti i te hō’ē fā’ari parau nō te ha’apahu i te mau parau tāmau, mai te mau pātara’a parau ’e te mau parau mātā’ia. ’Ia vaoho-noa-hia te reira ma te pāpa’i-’ore-hia, e fa’anaho noa te application i teie tuha’a nā ’oe.
cacheFolder-wizard: Tautau ’outou? ’A ha’atī’ahia teie tuha’a. E mā’iti mātou i te hō’ē vāhi mātauhia e tano nō te nu’ura’a o te ta’ata.
camera-access-required: ’Aita e fā’arihia ra te tura’i tātā’ira’a ’aore rā tē ma’iri ra te mau fa’ati’ara’a
camera-access-required-explain: ’A tāmata i te hō’ē tura’i ’ē, ’aore rā ’a fa’atere fa’ahou i te porotarama ’ia oti te mau fa’ati’ara’a tura’i i te hōro’ahia i roto i te mau Fa’anahora’a Application.
camera-as-background: Te tura’i nō te hi’ora’a tuati
change-tag-explain: ’A taui i te huru ’e te i’oa o te tāpa’o nō teie parau mātā’ia.
choose-a-document-for-import: ’A mā’iti i te hō’ē tumu parau, penina, ’aore rā upo’o parau:
choose-a-folder: ’A mā’iti i te hō’ē fā’ari parau
circuit-overseer: Ti’aau nō te tahi mau amuira’a
clear-cache: E tāmā i te pūputu’ite tāpuni
clicking-it-will-allow-you-to-start-and-: ’Ia nī’iti-’ia, e ti’a ia ’oe ia ha’amata e ia tāpū i te pehe roromira. E fa’ahoro ’a’ano noa te pehe hou te hora putuputura’a ’ia ha’amā’itihia ia M³, e e tāpū ’a’ano noa ato’a i mua i te ha’amatara’a o te putuputura’a. Noa atu rā, e ti’a ia fa’ahoro-rima-hia te pehe roromira i muri iho i te pure fa’atopara’a, mā te fa’a’ohipa i teie pata.
clicking-it-will-allow-you-to-temporaril: ’Ia nī’iti-’ia, e nehenehe ’oe e huna taime noa i te roromira e te ’īrava nō te matahiti, nō te fa’a’ite i te mau ta’ata i ni’a ia Zoom i muri mai. ’Ia oti te tuha’a a Zoom, e nehenehe ’oe e fa’a’ite fa’ahou i te ’īrava nō te matahiti mā te fa’a’ohipa i taua pata ra.
clicking-the-close-button-again-will-clo: ’Ia nī’iti-fa’ahou-hia taua pata ra, e fātau ia M³.
co-final-talk: Orara’a parau hope’a a te tahi rurura’a ha’a’atira’a
co-service-talk: Orara’a parau nō te tāvinira’a a te tahi rurura’a ha’a’atira’a
configure-a-scene-in-obs-studio-to-captu: E fa’ahu’ahu’a i te hō’ē fa’a’itera’a i roto ia OBS Studio nō te haru i te ha’amāramarama roromira.
configure-a-scene-in-obs-studio-to-show-: E fa’ahu’ahu’a i te hō’ē fa’a’itera’a i roto ia OBS Studio nō te fa’a’ite i te tahua ’ā’ano.
configure-the-websocket-plugin-in-obs-st: E ti’a ia ’oe ia fa’ahu’ahu’a i te tīpahu @:obsWebSocket i roto ia OBS Studio. E tītau-ato’a-hia te tīpahu nō te ’Acha’amata roromira Virtual Camera, nō reira, ’ia pāpū ē ’ua tū’atihia e ’ua fa’anaho-ato’a-hia te reira.
congregation-lookup-explain: Teie te huru, ’a pāpa’i i te tahi mau ta’o fā’ito mai te i’oa o tā ’outou amuira’a ’e te oire a henua rā e vai ai te reira. E fāna’o-hia teie mau parau nō te tātara-noa-ra’a mai i te porotarama o te mau rurura’a ’e te reo.
congregationMeetings: Te mau putuputura'a a te amuira’a
congregationMeetingsDescription: Te mau fa’anahora’a nō tā ’outou amuira’a ’e te porotarama o te mau putuputura'a
congregationName-explain: E fa’a’itehia teie i’oa i roto i te tātara’a mā’itira’a fāito o te application iti.
convertFilesToMp4: E fa’ariro i te mau pu’e parau fa’arereihia ’ei MP4
convertFilesToMp4-explain: ’Ia fa’atupuhia te reira, e fa’arirohia te mau pu’e parau ’ere-pāpa’ira’a-ata ’ei huru MP4 hou ’a fa’arerei ai. Māoti te reira e tū’ati ai te reira i te rorohiko o Zoom nō te ’ōpere-noa-ra’a i te MP4, e fāna’ohia ai te hō’ē fa’ata’ira’a parau mātā’ia māmā a’e ’e te maita’i roa atu i te ’ōperera’a ha’amāramarama.
coWeek: Te fāreira’a i muri nei a te hi’opo’a ha’a’ati
coWeek-explain: ’Ia pāpa’ihia te reira, e rāve’a tā M³ nō te fa’anu’u-noa-ra’a i te putuputura'a o te rotopū hebedoma i te mahana piti o taua hebedoma ra. E ha’apa’e-ato’a-hia te mau parau mātā’ia o te Ha’api’ira’a Bibilia a te amuira’a, ’e e ha’apa’ehia te mau hīmene fa’ari’ira’a nō te rurura’a o te rotopū hebedoma ’e tō te hope’a hebedoma.
currently-loading: Te fā’fa’ata’a-fa’ahou-hia nei te mau parau mātā’ia nō teie mahana.
custom-background-removed: Ua huri-fa’ahou-hia te tua hōho’a mā’iti i te huru mātāmua.
custom-background-set: Ua fa’’ari-hia te hōho’a i mā’itihia ’ei mono nō te ’īrava nō te matahiti.
custom-background-will-not-persist: A hi’o mai na : e ’ore e tāpurahia te tua hōho’a mā’iti ’ia fa’aru’e ’oe i te application.
customEventLastSongShortcut-explain: Pā’atā papāmāha e hā’ono-fa’ahou-hia ’ia fa’a’oti te hīmene hope’a o te putuputura’a.
customEventMediaPauseShortcut: Pā’atā mātā’ia nō te rorouira fa’aea-noa
customEventMediaPauseShortcut-explain: Keyboard shortcut sent when media is paused.
customEventMediaPlayShortcut-explain: Keyboard shortcut sent when media starts playing.
customEventMediaStopShortcut-explain: Keyboard shortcut sent when media stops playing.
darkMode-explain: Force the app to use light or dark mode, or use the system default
delete-media-explain: Choose this option to delete the selected media item.
delete-selected-media-confirmation: Are you sure you want to delete {count} selected media item(s)? This action cannot be undone.
delete-selected-media-explain: This will permanently delete the selected media items from your computer if they were added manually. This will not delete any media that was downloaded automatically.
disableHardwareAcceleration-explain: This disables hardware acceleration in M³. Toggling this setting requires a restart of the app to take effect. This may resolve graphical glitches or crashes on some systems, but is not otherwise recommended.
disableMediaFetching: Disable features for regular meetings and automatic media fetching
disableMediaFetching-explain: This setting should remain disabled in almost all cases to ensure that regular meeting media is downloaded automatically. Enabling this setting will require all media to be added manually. This setting should only be enabled in profiles that will be used exclusively for special events such as theocratic schools, assemblies, or conventions.
disk-space-is-running-low: Your computer is running low on disk space. Please free up at least 10 GB of disk space to ensure M³ can function properly.
does-your-kingdom-hall-use-a-program-cal: Does your Kingdom Hall use a program called @:obsStudio?
doing-so-will-greatly-simplify-and-facil: Doing so will greatly simplify and facilitate sharing media during hybrid meetings.
dont-forget-add-missing-media: Don't forget to add any missing songs or media.
dont-forget-to-add-circuit-overseer-date: For best results, add the date of the circuit overseer's visit to the "@:congregationMeetings" section in the Settings.
drag-and-drop-or-click-to-browse: Drag and drop files here or click to browse.
drop-media-here: Drop here to add to this section
edit-sections-explain: Add, reorder or change custom media sections
enableAutomaticMeetingScheduleUpdates: Enable automatic meeting schedule updates from the official website
enableAutomaticMeetingScheduleUpdates-ex: If enabled, M³ will periodically check the official website of Jehovah's Witnesses to see if your congregation's current and future meeting times have changed and update them automatically in the app. This only works if you added the congregation profile using the lookup tool and haven't modified the congregation name.
enableCacheAutoClear-explain: When enabled, the app will automatically clear unused cached files on a regular basis. This helps to free up disk space and keep the cache size manageable.
enableCustomEvents-explain: Configure keyboard shortcuts to trigger when various events occur, such as when media is played, paused or stopped, or when the last song is played during a meeting. This is useful for advanced users who want to integrate with other applications, such as AutoHotkey or AutoIt.
enableExtraCache-explain: Cache all songbook videos to improve performance. Note that this will increase the size of the media cache.
enableFolderWatcher-explain: This feature monitors a folder of your choice for new files, automatically adding them to the media list.
enableKeyboardShortcuts: ’A fa’atupu i te mau pā’atā papāmāha
enableKeyboardShortcuts-explain: ’A fa’a’ohipa i te mau pā’atā papāmāha nō te fa’atere-vave-ra’a i te mau rorouira mātā’ia.
enableMediaAutoExport-explain: E hā’ono-noa-hia te mau rorouira mātā’ia i roto i te vaira’a parau i mā’itihia, ma te fa’anahora’a ta’a ’ē nō te mahana tā’itahi.
enableMediaDisplayButton-explain: E fa’ari’i i te mau hōho’a ’e te mau tāta’ira’a i roto i te hō’ē ha’amāramaramara’a ’aore rā i ni’a i te hō’ē paruai i rāpae. ’Ia fa’a’ohipahia i te Piha nō te Basileia, e tītauhia i te rahira’a o te taime ’ia fa’atupuhia teie fa’anahora’a.
enableMediaWindowFadeTransitions: ’A fa’atupu i te tauira’a-māru ’ia huna-hia ’aore rā ’ia fa’ari’i-hia te ha’amāramaramara’a media
enableMediaWindowFadeTransitions-explain: ’Ia fa’atupuhia teie fa’anahora’a, e fā mai ’e e mou māru noa mai te ha’amāramaramara’a media, e ’ere rā mā te ’ānimanina-vave-ra’a. E hōro’a mai te reira i te hō’ē hi’ora’a nehenehe roa atu ā.
enableMusicButton: ’A fa’atupu i te fa’ata’ira’a hīmene tua
enableMusicButton-explain: ’A fa’atā’i i te mau hīmene na mua atu ’e i muri a’e i te mau putuputura’a mā te tahi noa mau nī’ira’a.
enablePinyinSongs: Mā’iti na mua i te mau hīmene pinyin
enablePinyinSongs-explain: ’Ia ’itehia te hō’ē hīmene putuputura’a ’āparau-hia nā roto i te pāpa’ira’a pinyin i roto i te vaira’a parau hīmene pinyin, e fa’a’ohipahia te reira nō te mono i te hīmene mātauhia.
enablePlaybackSpeedControl: ’A fa’atupu i te fa’aterera’a i te vitiviti o te fa’ata’ira’a
enablePlaybackSpeedControl-explain: E fa’ati’a i te fa’atano-ra’a i te vitiviti o te fa’ata’ira’a re’o ’e te hōho’a parau nā roto i te tāpura ’ohipa ta’a ’ē.
enableSubtitles-explain: ’A fa’atupu i te parau pāpa’i nā mua roa nō te mau tāta’ira’a hōho’a ato’a.
enableTimerDisplay-explain: ’A fa’atupu i teie fa’anahora’a nō te fa’ari’i i te hō’ē tāmerahira’a i roto i te hō’ē ha’amāramaramara’a ta’a ’ē nō te fa’atano i te taime o te feia tōro’a. E ti’a ’ia fa’atupuhia te reira ’ia fari’ihia nōna e te tōmite parau a te mau tino matahiapo nō te vāhi iho.
enter-a-key-combination-now-using-your-k: ’A tāpa’o i tōna ’āpiti-ra’a tāpau i teie nei mā te fa’a’ohipa i tō ’oe hi’a tāpau.
enter-the-port-and-password-configured-i: ’A tāpa’o i te tōfati ’e te parau huna i fa’atano-hia i roto i te ha’amana’ora’a uira @:obsWebSocket nō te OBS Studio.
entireFile: ’A fa’ata’i mai te ha’amatara’a e tae roa atu i te hope’a
entireFile-question: Te pāpū rā ānei ’oe ē tē hina’aro nei ’oe e fa’ata’i i te vaira’a parau tā’āto’a mai te ha’amatara’a e tae roa atu i te hope’a?
error-reading-playlist-file: ’Aore i ti’a ’ia tai’ohia te vaira’a parau tāpura hōho’a a te JW Library. Pāpū roa ’ua ’ino tōna fā’ito ’aore rā ’ua hape.
errorDownloadingMeetingMedia: Hape i te fā’utara’a mai i te mau media nō te putuputura’a
excludeFootnotes: ’A ’ūpooti i te mau media mai roto mai i te mau tātara’ra’a nō te Ha’api’ira’a o Te Pare Tia’ira’a
excludeFootnotes-explain: ’Eiaha e fa’ari’i i te mau tāta’ira’a hōho’a ’aore rā i te tahi atu mau media mai roto mai i te mau tātara’ra’a nō te mau parau pāpa’i o Te Pare Tia’ira’a.
excludeTh: ’A ’ūpooti i te mau media tā’āto’a mai roto mai i te porotita Ha’api’ira’a
excludeTh-explain: ’Eiaha e fa’ari’i i te mau tāta’ira’a hōho’a ’aore rā i te tahi atu mau media mai roto mai i te porotita Ha’api’ira’a.
excludeWtParagraphVideos: ’A ’ūpooti i te tahi atu mau tāta’ira’a hōho’a nō te Ha’api’ira’a o Te Pare Tia’ira’a
excludeWtParagraphVideos-explain: ’Eiaha e fa’ari’i i te tahi atu mau tāta’ira’a hōho’a i fa’ahiti-hia i roto i te mau paratarafa nō te Ha’api’ira’a o Te Pare Tia’ira’a.
feel-free-to-browse-around-the-other-ava: ’Eiaha e ha’ama i te hi’o i te tahi atu mau rāve’a, ’aore rā, mai te peu e mea au a’e nā ’oe, e nehenehe ’oe e haere ti’a atu i tō mua i te pāpa’i hōho’a nō te fa’ata’i i te media nō te ha’amata i te fa’a’ite i te reira.
fileProcessError: Ua tupu te hō’ē hape i te taime a tātara ai i teie putu’ite
filetypeNotSupported: ’Aitā teie huru putu’ite e fari’ihia atu ra
firstDayOfWeek-explain: ’A mā’iti i te mahana matāmua o te hepetoma nō te fa’a’ite i tō mua i te tāpula mahana.
folderToWatch-explain: Te putu’ira’a e tīa’ihia nō te mau media ’āpī. E ti’a i teie putu’ira’a ia fari’i i te mau putu’ira’a ri’i i fa’ata’ahia nā roto i te tai’o mahana (fa’anahora’a: MMMM-AA-MM). Te mau putu’ite i roto i te mau putu’ira’a ’o te ’ore e pe’e i teie ture, e fa’aru’ehia ia.
gpu-crash-detected-explain: Hardware acceleration was temporarily disabled due to a recent crash. If this persists, please update your graphics drivers or disable hardware acceleration in settings.
gpu-crash-detected-restarting: GPU crash detected. Switching to software mode. Please restart the app for changes to take effect.
hardwareAccelerationDisabledExplain: Hardware acceleration is currently disabled via settings.
help-translate-new: The current media language is not available as a display language in M³. Would you like to help translate M³ for users who speak this language?
here-are-some-of-the-newest-features: Here are just a few of the latest features and updates:
hide-from-list-explain: Hidden files can be restored at any time using the @:extra-media menu.
hide-selected-media-confirmation: Are you sure you want to hide {count} selected media item(s)?
hide-selected-media-explain: This will hide the selected media items from the media list for the currently selected day.
hideMediaLogo: Hide JW logo from media presentation window
hideMediaLogo-explain: This removes the square JW logo from the bottom right corner. If using at a Kingdom Hall, this should in most cases be disabled.
image-duration-explain: Set how long this image will be displayed while this section is being looped
images-videos-explain: Photos, videos, audio files, PDF documents, and other media files
import-media-from-s34mp: Add media from public talk outlines
in-what-language-should-media-be-downloa: In what language should media be downloaded?
includePrinted-explain: Include additional images from the printed editions of publications that may not be available in the digital versions.
integrationsDescription: Configure integration with other apps and services and additional features that may be useful during meetings
jw-playlist: Tāpula hōho’a nō te JW Library
jw-playlist-explain: Putu’ite tāpula hōho’a i hāpono-fa’aho’i-hia mai te JW Library mai
jw-playlist-import-explain: Māoti teie tōro’a, e nehenehe ’oe e ti'i mai i te hō’ē putu’ite tāpula hōho’a nō te JW Library. E tātara ti’a te fa’anahora’a i te mau media i mā’itihia nō te nene’i i roto i te tāpula media. E roromi-uira-hia te mau hōho’a tātiri nā roto i te reo i fa’atano-hia i roto i te tāpula hōho’a, mai te peu e mea tīa’i.
jweventSite: Mau Tāpuro’a Rahi a te 'Ite nō Iehova
jwpub-file-explain: Buka i roromi-uira-hia mai te reni rorouira mana a te 'Ite nō Iehova mai
jwpub-file-found: E ti’a i te mau putu’ite JWPUB ia ravehia nā roto i te rāve’a ta’a ’ē.
jwpubNoMultimedia: ’A’ore e media i roto i teie putu’ite JWPUB
keyboardShortcuts: Mau rāve’a ’oi’oi o te pitopito pāpa’i
lang-explain: A mā’iti i te reo nō te mau putuputura'a. Teie te reo e fa’a’ohipahia nō te roromi uira ’e nō te fa’ata’i i te mau media.
langFallback-explain: E nehenehe ’oe e mā’iti i te hō’ē reo tauturu i’ō nei, mai te peu e pinepine te ’orera’a e noha’a mai te mau media nā roto i te reo tumu o te amuira’a.
langSubtitles: Reo o te mau parau i pāpa’ihia
langSubtitles-explain: Nā roto i teie reo e roromi-uira-hia ai ’e e fa’ata’i-hia ai te mau parau i pāpa’ihia.
latest-videos-from-jw-org: Mau tōtaura’a hōho’a ’āpī roa a’e nō runga i te reni rorouira mana a te 'Ite nō Iehova
local-media-explain-1: A fa’ata’i i te mau hōho’a pāpa’i, te mau tōtaura’a hōho’a, te mau putu’ite pehe, te mau tāpura pehe JW Library, te mau putu’ite JWPUB, ’aore rā te mau parau PDF mai ni’a mai i tō ’oe rorouira, ’e e fā mai te reira i roto i te tāpura media.
local-media-explain-2: E fari’ihia te mau huru media mātauhia ato’a.
localAppLang-explain: Nā roto i teie reo e fa’a’itehia ai te M³. ’Aita te reira e taui i te reo e roromi-uira-hia ai te mau media.
localDateFormat-explain: A fa’anehenehe i te huru fa’a’itera’a i te mau ta’io mahana i roto i te application.
look-for-this-button-in-m-s-footer: A hi’o i teie pitopito i raro roa i te rorouira M³:
m-is-now-ready-to-be-used: Ua ineine te M³ nō te fa’ahoro.
magazine-watchtower-public: Te Pare Tia’ira’a—Nō te ta’ata ato’a
main-window-is-on-this-screen: ’Aita e riro te ha’amāramārama media i te ha’amaura’ahia i’ō nei, nō te mea tei ni’a i teie ’āparau te ha’amāramārama rahi o te M³.
mainOfficialWebsite: Tahua uira mana a te Ite nō Iehova
make-sure-that-m-is-in-not-use-before-qu: A hi’opo’a maita’i ē ’aita te M³ e fa’a’ohipahia ra hou a ’ōpani ai.
maxRes: Fā’atōrea rahi roa a te mau nene’ira’a parau
maxRes-explain: A mā’iti i te fā’atōrea rahi roa nō te mau video. ’Eiaha te mau video i hau atu i teie fā’atōrea ia tātā’ihia.
media-display-settings: Te mau fa’ahorora’a nō te fa’a’itera’a media
media-from-s34mp: Te mau media nō te mau tāpura parau orero
media-item-missing-explain: This media item is missing. To play it, add it using the @:extra-media menu or by dragging it into the media list from your computer.
mediaRetrievalAndPlaybackDescription: Configure meeting media download and playback settings.
meeting-current-schedule-updated: The current meeting schedule has been synchronized from the official website.
meeting-future-schedule-updated: Future meeting schedule changes have been synchronized from the official website.
meeting-schedule-change-applied: A scheduled meeting time change has been applied.
meetingScheduleChangeDate-explain: Enter the date when the new meeting schedule should take effect. All meetings from this date on will follow the new schedule, and the old schedule will be permanently replaced.
meetingScheduleChangeMwDay-explain: Select the new day for the midweek meeting. Leave blank if the day will not change.
meetingScheduleChangeMwStartTime-explain: Select the new start time for the midweek meeting. Leave blank if the time will not change.
meetingScheduleChangeOnce: Apply schedule change to one week only
meetingScheduleChangeOnce-explain: Enable this to apply the schedule change to only one week, starting on the specified date. This is useful for one-time changes, such as during a circuit overseer's visit to a neighboring congregation. Otherwise, the schedule will be updated for all meetings as of the specified date.
meetingScheduleChangeWeDay-explain: Select the new day for the weekend meeting. Leave blank if the day will not change.
meetingScheduleChangeWeStartTime-explain: Select the new start time for the weekend meeting. Leave blank if the time will not change.
meetingStopBufferSeconds: How many seconds before a meeting should background music stop?
meetingStopBufferSeconds-explain: Adjust the slider to set the desired time (in seconds) before a meeting starts when background music should stop.
memorial-background: Image to be displayed during the Memorial
memorialDate-explain: If entered, M³ will automatically try to download and prepare the background image for the Memorial. The image will be displayed instead of the yeartext. Beware that this is an experimental feature and may not work as expected.
memorialFetchBgSuccess: Successfully configured the image to be displayed during the Memorial
memorialFetchError: Error fetching media to be displayed during the Memorial
memorialFetchErrorNoBg: Error fetching the image to de displayed during the Memorial. Please ensure that the image is downloaded and prepared before the Memorial.
memorialFetchSongs: Adding songs that will be sung during the Memorial
memorialFetchSongsError: Error fetching the songs that will be sung during the Memorial
memorialFetchSongsSuccess: Successfully added songs that will be sung during the Memorial
memorialFetchSuccess: Successfully retrieved media to be displayed during the Memorial
memorialFetchVideoSuccess: Successfully configured the Memorial Welcome Video
meteredConnection-explain: Turn this on if you have limited internet (like mobile data). In this case, M³ won't automatically download videos and files unless they're needed for meetings on either the current day or the next one.
musicVolume: Te faito ha’uti o te upaupa i muri
musicVolume-explain: Choose the volume of the background music playback. This allows you to set a lower volume for background music, while keeping the volume of other media high.
mwDay-explain: Choose the day on which the midweek meeting takes place.
mwStartTime-explain: Choose the time at which the midweek meeting starts.
next-day-with-media: Go to the first day with media
no-cache-items-found-to-clear: No cache items found to clear.
no-circuit-overseer-date-set: The date of the circuit overseer's visit is not set
no-media-files-for-section: There are no media items for this meeting section.
no-media-for-this-category: There is no media for this category
no-media-for-this-item: This item has no media available
no-media-items-found: No media items were found in this document
no-playlist-items-found: No items were found in the selected JW playlist.
no-results-explain: You'll need to enter your congregation's information manually if the lookup is unsuccessful.
no-results-short-explain: You'll need to enter more than two characters to start searching.
no-unused-cache-items-found-to-clear: No unused cache items found to clear.
noDownloadsInProgress: No downloads are currently in progress
not-yet-available-due-to-metered-connect: The media for this meeting isn't available yet because your settings prevent downloading media for dates further than 1 day in the future.
notice-the-media-window-is-now-being-dis: You'll notice the media window is now being displayed! But let's keep going.
notice-the-yeartext-is-now-being-display: You'll notice the yeartext is now being displayed in the media window! But let's keep going.
obs-studio-disconnected-banner: M³ is unable to connect to OBS Studio. Please ensure that @:obsStudio is running and configured correctly.
obs-studio-is-a-free-app-used-to-manage-: @:obsStudio is a free app used to manage camera and video feeds in many Kingdom Halls.
obsCameraScene-explain: The scene in @:obsStudio that will be used as the default stage view. As per latest direction, this should be a wide shot.
obsEnable-explain: Connect M³ to @:obsStudio to enable automated switching between media and camera scenes.
obsHideIcons: Do not display icons in the scene switcher
obsHideIcons-explain: When enabled, icons will be hidden in the scene switcher. This may increase the legibility of scene names.
obsImageScene-explain: A scene can be configured in @:obsStudio specifically to display images, for example in a picture-in-picture style. If this is left blank, the default media scene will be used instead.
obsMediaScene-explain: The scene in @:obsStudio that will be used to broadcast media to Zoom participants.
obsPassword-explain: Find the configured password under Tools > WebSocket Server Settings in OBS Studio.
obsPort-explain: Find the configured port under Tools > WebSocket Server Settings in OBS Studio.
obsPostponeImages-explain: When enabled, images will only be displayed for Zoom participants when the media operator clicks on the "Show in @:obsStudio" button. This can be useful if you generally display images to the in-person audience before sharing them on Zoom.
obsQuickToggle-explain: When enabled, hovering over the @:obsStudio button will open the scene switcher. This can be useful for quickly switching scenes in @:obsStudio, especially if many scenes are configured.
obsRememberPreviouslyUsedScene: Remember previously used scene after media playback
obsRememberPreviouslyUsedScene-explain: When enabled, M³ will remember the scene that was active before media started playing and will return to it when media playback ends. Otherwise, M³ will switch to the default camera scene.
obsSwitchSceneAfterMedia: Delay scene changes when playing media
obsSwitchSceneAfterMedia-explain: When enabled, @:obsStudio will defer scene changes until after any currently playing media has finished. Note: enabling this option will also remove media and image scenes from the scene switcher.
once-the-scene-has-been-created-select-i: Once the scene has been created, select it here.
only-show-settings-that-are-not-valid: Only show settings that are not valid
path-probe-network-warning-caption: Please ensure that all configured paths are valid and can be written to. If they are network paths, please ensure that the network-related companion app is running or that the path is otherwise accessible.
path-probe-network-warning-message: There was an error writing to one of the configured paths.
pause-to-adjust-time: To enable scrubbing, the video must be paused
pdf-page-selection-prompt: This PDF has {totalPages} pages. Enter pages to import (for example: 1-3,5,7).
pinyinSongFolder-explain: Folder containing pinyin video songs (e.g. sjjm_s-Pi_CHS_066_r720P.mp4). When a pinyin file matching the meeting song number is found, it will be played instead.
play-only-this-clip-question: Are you sure you want to play this clip again?
play-while-downloading: Start streaming this media item from the internet while it's being downloaded
playback-rate: This media item is playing at a different speed than normal. Click to reset to normal speed.
please-use-image-or-jwpub: Please select an image file or a JWPUB file that contains an image
profile-type-regular: In most cases, choosing "Regular" is the best option. This will create a profile that downloads media for all meetings automatically and also enables media presentation features that are most often used during congregation meetings.
profile-type-special: Choose "Other" if you are creating a profile for which no media should be automatically downloaded. Media will have to be manually added for use in this profile. This type of profile is used mostly for theocratic schools, assemblies, and other special cases.
publication-media-explain: Get media from magazines, brochures, books, and other publications
receive-beta-updates: Receive early access to beta versions
receive-beta-updates-explain: Beta updates may contain unstable features and potential bugs. Do not enable this option on the computer used for live meetings.
recordingEnable: Integrate M³ with an external recording application
recordingEnable-explain: Since M³ doesn't include a built-in recording feature, enabling this option lets it control an external recording app using keyboard shortcuts to start and stop recording. Note: this option is not compatible with OBS Studio. If you are using OBS Studio, please use the OBS Studio recording feature in the OBS Studio integration instead.
recordingFolder-explain: Specify the folder where the external application saves recordings. Optional, but if provided, M³ will display a button to open this folder.
recordingStartShortcut-explain: Enter the keyboard shortcut that starts recording in the external application. M³ will send this shortcut when you press @:start-recording in the Meeting recordings popup.
recordingStopShortcut-explain: Enter the keyboard shortcut that stops recording in the external application. M³ will send this shortcut when you press @:stop-recording in the Meeting recordings popup. If left blank, M³ will reuse the @:start-recording shortcut.
refresh-all-meeting-media-confirm: This will force a refresh of all meetings and download new versions of any media that has been updated. Note that this will not affect any media that has been manually added. Are you sure you want to proceed?
relinkCongregationButton-explain: Enable automatic meeting day and time synchronization from the official website of Jehovah's Witnesses.
rename-explain: Media items are not permanently renamed; the original name will be restored when the app is restarted.
repeat: This media item will loop continuously
repeat-media-item-explain: Choose this if the selected media item should play on a loop until it's manually stopped.
repeat-section-explain: Enable continuous playback of all media items in this section.
reSyncMeetingScheduleButton-explain: Use this to manually synchronize your meeting days and times with the information provided on the official website of Jehovah's Witnesses.
scene-not-found: A problem occurred while activating a scene in OBS Studio.
scene-not-found-explain: Please check the configured scenes in the Settings.
screen-access-required: Screen recording permissions are required for this feature
screen-access-required-explain: Please restart the app when screen recording permissions have been granted in System Settings.
select-a-custom-background: Choose an image that will be displayed as the background image instead of the yeartext. This would normally be used only on special occasions, such as the Memorial.
select-a-date-to-begin: Please select a date to begin.
select-media-items-explain: Select which media items to import from this document.
select-s34mp-media: Click on a public talk title to add its media. To refresh the current file with a newer version of the S-34 or S-34mp, click Replace.
select-s34mp-to-add-pt-media: Download the combined S-34 JWPUB file containing all public talk outlines from the official website of Jehovah's Witnesses. If that file is not available in your language or branch territory, you can download the S-34mp media playlist JWPUB file instead. Once downloaded, selecting the file here will allow you to access all available media for public talks. The selected JWPUB file will be cached, but can be updated or replaced at any time if a newer version becomes available.
set-custom-durations: Set custom start and end times
setupWizard.intro: M³ makes playing media at congregation meetings easy and stress-free. Let's configure a few things, and then you'll be ready to go.
shortcutMediaNext-explain: Shortcut to select the next video or picture in the list.
shortcutMediaPauseResume-explain: Shortcut to play or pause the currently selected media. If the media is an image, pausing will have the same effect as stopping.
shortcutMediaPrevious-explain: Shortcut to select the previous video or picture in the list.
shortcutMediaStop-explain: Shortcut to stop playing the currently selected media.
shortcutMediaWindow-explain: Shortcut to quickly hide or show the media window.
shortcutMusic-explain: Shortcut to start or stop the background music.
show-hidden-media-explain: This will show any media that was previously hidden for the currently selected day.
sign-language-bible-media: Add media from the Bible in sign language
some-media-items-are-hidden: Some media items have been hidden.
some-media-items-are-missing-explain: Some media could not be downloaded automatically. You can add this media manually if needed by using the @:extra-media menu or by dragging it into the media list from your computer.
some-songs-are-duplicated: Some songs appear more than once in the media list. Please check if this is intentional.
stop-playing-media-first: Please stop media playback before navigating to a different page.
stop-playing-media-first-explain: You can't change pages while media is playing.
stop-repeat-media-item: Do not loop this media item
stop-repeat-media-item-explain: Choose this if the selected media item should play until the end and then stop.
study-bible-media: Images, videos, charts and maps from the Study Bible
successfully-migrated-from-the-previous-: Successfully migrated from the previous version
suppressHardwareAccelerationReminder-exp: Disables the reminder to re-enable hardware acceleration if it was manually disabled.
sureStopVideo: Are you sure you want to stop the video?
the-name-of-your-congregation-or-group-w: The profile name will help you to quickly switch between profiles, if you ever decide to create more than one in the future.
there-are-no-media-items-for-the-selecte: There are no media items for the selected date.
this-is-a-test-version: This is a test version! Use it for testing purposes but don't keep it installed.
this-meeting-is-far-in-the-future: This meeting is in the future...
this-song-is-duplicated: This song appears more than once in the media list.
this-will-only-delete-media-for-this-day: This action will only remove items that were added manually for the selected day
this-will-speed-up-media-retrieval-for-m: This will speed up media retrieval for meeting media, but is not mandatory.
thisShouldBeInvestigatedToEnsureThatAllR: This should be investigated to ensure that all required meeting media is present
timerAutoOpen-explain: Automatically open the timer window on application launch or when changing congregations.
timerBackgroundColor-explain: The background color of the timer window.
timerEnableMeetingAheadBehind-explain: When enabled, the timer will display whether the meeting is ahead or behind schedule.
timerEnableMeetingCountdown-explain: Show a countdown timer until the start of scheduled meetings.
timerMeetingCountdownMinutes-explain: Configure the number of minutes for which the countdown timer should be shown on the timer display before the start of scheduled meetings. Note that the countdown is never displayed on the main media display.
timerMode-explain: Choose whether the timer should count up or count down by default.
timerOvertimeAnimation-explain: Make the timer gently blink when the participant is overtime.
timerOvertimeBackgroundColor-explain: The background color of the timer window when the participant is overtime.
timerOvertimeIndicator-explain: When enabled, the timer will visually indicate if the participant has gone overtime.
timerOvertimeShowAmountOnly: Show only elapsed overtime amount in count-up mode
timerOvertimeShowAmountOnly-explain: If using count-up mode, and if the planned duration is exceeded, the timer will display the amount of time by which the participant is over (e.g. -00:30) instead of the total elapsed part time.
timerOvertimeTextColor-explain: The text color of the timer when the participant is overtime.
timerShowOnActionIsland: Show timer value on action island
timerShowOnActionIsland-explain: Show the current timer value on the action island timer button.
timerTextColor-explain: The color of the timer text.
timerTextSize-explain: The size of the timer text.
to-quickly-show-and-hide-zoom-participan: Tip: To ensure you're able to quickly show and hide Zoom participants on the TV screens when needed, make sure that the setting to "use dual monitors" in Zoom is enabled.
update-available-please-update: A new version of M³ is available! We recommend updating to receive the latest features, bug fixes, and security updates.
update-downloaded: A new version of M³ has been downloaded and is ready to be installed.
update-downloading: A new version of M³ is available and downloading in the background.
update-error-read-only-volume: M³ could not be updated because it is stored in a directory that is read-only. Please move M³ to a different location, such as the Applications folder.
updates-disabled-warning: Please enable updates to receive new features, bug fixes, and important security updates.
use-the-import-button-to-add-media-for-t: Use the @:extra-media button to add media for this date, or select a different date to view the corresponding media for that day.
use-the-slider-below-to-adjust-the-start: Use the slider below to adjust the start and end time of this media item. This is useful for playing only certain parts of a video.
watch-folder-error-caption: Please ensure that all necessary companion apps, such as Dropbox, are running, and that the path provided is valid and can be written.
watch-folder-error-message: An error occurred with the watch folder.
watched-media-item-explain: This media item was added from a monitored folder
weDay-explain: Choose the day on which the weekend meeting takes place.
well-start-fetching-media-while-we-wrap-: We'll start fetching media while we wrap up with our initial setup.
weStartTime-explain: Choose the time at which the weekend meeting starts.
what-are-your-meeting-days-and-times-wel: What are your meeting days and times? We'll use this information to display the media calendar.
what-kind-of-profile-is-this: Choose the type of profile you would like to create.
what-language-would-you-like-m-to-be-dis: What language would you like M³ to be displayed in?
when-you-are-done-presenting-the-website: When you no longer need to present the website, either close the website window, or click on the "Stop Mirroring" button in the top right corner of this window.
when-you-click-the-button-on-the-top-rig: When you click the "Open Website" button on the top right corner of this window, a new window will open to the official website of Jehovah's Witnesses.
willProbablyBeAvailableLater: However, the missing media is likely to become available closer to the meeting date
would-you-like-to-enable-songbook-video-: Would you like to cache all songbook videos?
would-you-like-to-integrate-m-with-obs-s: Would you like to integrate M³ with @:obsStudio?
would-you-like-to-integrate-zoom: Would you like to integrate M³ with Zoom?
yeartext-cleared: The yeartext for {currentYear} has now been restored.
yeartext-preview-failed: Failed to fetch the yeartext for {year}. Please try again later.
yeartext-preview-next-year: Would you like to preview the yeartext for {year}?
yeartext-preview-success: The yeartext for {year} will now be shown for 10 seconds.
you-can-navigate-the-website-before-pres: If necessary, you can navigate to a specific page before presenting it to the audience. When you're ready, press the "Start Mirroring" button on the top right corner of this window. What you see in the website window will now be displayed in the media window for the audience to see.
zoom-integration-explain: Enable this to let M³ automatically start and stop Zoom screen sharing when media starts and stops playing.
zoomAutoFocusMediaWindow: Automatically focus media window after Zoom screen sharing starts
zoomAutoFocusMediaWindow-explain: This is usually not required, but could be helpful on some systems if the media window regularly loses focus after Zoom screen sharing starts.
zoomEnable-explain: This will not automate Zoom fully. Rather, it will attempt to start and stop Zoom screen sharing using the keyboard shortcut configured in Zoom's "Start/stop screen sharing" setting whenever media starts and stops playing in M³.
zoomScreenShareShortcut-explain: Enter the keyboard shortcut configured in Zoom's "Start/stop screen sharing" setting. M³ will send this shortcut when media starts playing (to start screen sharing) and when it stops (to stop screen sharing). In order to use this feature, you need to enable the "Global shortcut" setting for that particular shortcut in Zoom's settings.
